title: Physical Data
shortDesc: A project on visualizing data through physical installations.

thumbnail.caption: Thumbnail image for Physical Data project showcasing the installation we created.

expertise.reason: Translating complex astronaut characteristic data into physical representations, structuring multi-variable datasets for interactive physical visualization
Building functional physical installation using Arduino, Raspberry Pi, 3D printing, and laser cutting to realize data physicalization concept
Designed interactive lego-like astronaut building system focusing on aesthetic quality and physical materiality of data representation

content.overview: This Project, in module 8 is the Crown Piece of my Bachelor Creative Technology. Here you work with a wonderful team of 12 people, that all have very different skillsets. I'd Reccomend watching this video about it which really explains the project in a clear way!

video.caption: Documentary video showcasing the Physical Data project (You can see me as the first person in the video, and a large part of the voiceover!)

sections.text: This project was by far the most fun and the most stressful a project has ever been for me. Working together with 12 people and having complete freedom, creates a lot of ideas but thereby of course a lot of stress.

An interesting element of this project with regards to human computer interaction was the lego-like concept of building different astronauts. Each astronaut had different characteristics, and by combining them you could create a new astronaut with combined characteristics. This was a fun way of exploring combinations and seeing how different characteristics influenced the data physicalization.
